introSection:
Montanha de Leba (Portuguese for Leba Mountain) is a steel roller coaster located at Ulengo Center Glakeni in Luanda, Luanda, Angola. It opened with the opening of the Ulengo Center Glakeni on 22 July 2015.

The roller coaster is the largest roller coaster in Angola.
fullText:
Montanha de Leba (Portuguese for Leba Mountain) is a steel roller coaster located at Ulengo Center Glakeni in Luanda, Luanda, Angola. It opened with the opening of the Ulengo Center Glakeni on 22 July 2015.

The roller coaster is the largest roller coaster in Angola.

Orange track and blue supports.
